title: Trump’s Boat Strikes Have Failed to Curb Cocaine Flow to U.S., Experts Say
summary_full: Despite the rising body count off the South American coast, researchers say cocaine is as easy to get in many parts of the United States as it was before the strikes began.
summary_public: Despite the rising body count off the South American coast, researchers say cocaine is as easy to get in many parts of the United States as it was before the strikes began.
